ideal_must_detect.matched_text: S t r i c t l y  C o n f i d e n t i a l
distribution limited to issuer/ buyer counsel only
SSE 临时公告 to be filed only after embargo window opens
no cross‑border transfer of resident IDs
Transaction: Buyer to acquire 62% of the issued share capital of Orchid Ridge Robotics for RMB 480,000,000 (implied pre‑money RMB 775,000,000); closing consideration mix: cash and deferred payments.

Structure: Definitive agreements include Share Purchase Agreement (SPA), Shareholders’ Agreement (SHA), IP Assignment; governing law: PRC; closing targeted within T+65 days post‑signing; potential STAR Market path in 2027 subject to CSRC guidance and issuer readiness.

Consideration & escrow: RMB 408,000,000 cash at closing; RMB 72,000,000 deferred (24 months); 10% escrow holdback for 18 months; earn‑out up to RMB 60,000,000 upon FY2027 revenue > RMB 1.2bn; working capital true‑up ±RMB 10,000,000 collar.

Covenants: 3‑year non‑compete within PRC robotics sub‑segment; post‑closing IP assignment for “Orchid Servo‑X” and “MOSS‑Edge” product families; customer and supplier non‑solicit for 24 months; no dividends until net debt/EBITDA < 2.0x.

Compliance checklist: Issuer to prepare 内幕信息知情人名单 by 2026‑07‑13; BlueFerry counsel to circulate definitive check‑list; if embargo is breached before 2026‑07‑15 09:00 CST, buyer may delay closing; no USCC or resident ID to be stored outside PRC except as masked/hashed as noted.
